title: Eye-catching Product Description
scenario: Create a short product description for a new smartphone model. The description should highlight its high-quality camera and sleek design. The target artifact is a 50-word text that showcases the product's key features.
constraints: Must use action verbs like 'captures' or 'features'

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the description is under 50 words and uses action verbs like 'captures' or 'features'.
Evaluate the tone of the description, ensuring it's professional and engaging.
Verify that the description highlights the product's high-quality camera and sleek design.
